info.title: StackUnderflow API
info.description: Community Q&A platform API inspired by Stack Overflow.

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token. Example: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIs...

code.description: HTTP status code mirrored inside the response body.

message.example: You do not have permission to access this resource.
The requested resource was not found.

limit.description: Number of items returned per page.

total.description: Total number of items matching the query (across all pages).

totalPages.description: Total number of pages given the current limit.

description.description: Short description of what earns this badge.

tier.description: Badge tier indicating its prestige level.

awardedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the badge was awarded.

name.description: Full display name of the user.

avatarUrl.description: URL of the user's avatar image. Null when no avatar is set.

bio.description: Short biography written by the user (max 300 chars).
bio.example: Mathematician and writer. First programmer in history.

reputation.description: Accumulated reputation points earned through upvotes, accepted answers, etc.

badges.description: List of badges awarded to this user.

data.description: Array of items for the current page.

username.description: Updated username — lowercase letters, digits and underscores only (3–30 chars).

bio.example: Mathematician, writer, and pioneer of computing.

avatarUrl.description: URL pointing to the new avatar image.

id.description: Unique identifier of this activity event.

type.description: The kind of action that generated this activity event.

description.example: Your answer to "What is a monad?" was accepted.

reputationDelta.description: Reputation change caused by this event. Null when the event does not affect reputation.

relatedEntityId.description: ObjectId of the question, answer, or badge related to this event. Null when not applicable.

relatedEntityType.description: Collection / resource type of the related entity.

occurredAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.

userId.description: ObjectId of the user whose activity is listed.

events.description: Chronologically ordered list of activity events (newest first).

meta.description: Pagination metadata for the activity feed.

reputationThisMonth.description: Reputation delta for the current calendar month.

questionsCount.description: Total number of questions posted by the user.

answersCount.description: Total number of answers posted by the user.

acceptedAnswersCount.description: Number of answers that were accepted by the question author.

acceptanceRate.description: Ratio of accepted answers to total answers, expressed as a decimal between 0 and 1.

upvotesReceived.description: Total upvotes received across all questions and answers.

recentBadges.description: Up to 5 most recently awarded badges.

score.description: Net score (upvotes minus downvotes) for all posts under this tag.

topTags.description: Top 10 tags by post count for this user.

questionsCount.description: Total number of questions that carry this tag.

questionsThisWeek.description: Number of questions tagged in the past 7 days.

questionsThisMonth.description: Number of questions tagged in the past 30 days.

watchersCount.description: Number of users who are watching this tag.

name.description: URL-safe tag name — lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only (1–35 chars).

description.description: Short description of what the tag represents (max 500 chars). Null when no description has been written yet.
description.example: TypeScript is a strongly typed programming language that builds on JavaScript.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the tag was created.

wikiBody.description: Full Markdown wiki body for the tag. May include usage guidance, links and code examples. Null when no wiki has been written yet.
wikiBody.example:
## TypeScript

TypeScript is a superset of JavaScript that adds optional static typing...

relatedTags.description: Up to 10 tags frequently used together with this tag.

moderators.description: Users designated as moderators / curators for this tag.

data.description: Array of items for the current page.

name.description: Unique tag name — lowercase letters, digits and hyphens only (1–35 chars). Must not already exist in the system.

description.description: Short description for the tag (max 500 chars). Recommended but optional.
description.example: Drizzle ORM is a TypeScript ORM for SQL databases.

wikiBody.description: Optional initial Markdown wiki body. Can be added or updated later by moderators.
wikiBody.example:
## Drizzle ORM

Drizzle is a headless TypeScript ORM...

tags.description: Array of tag names to watch or ignore (1–20 per request). Tag names must already exist in the system.

watchedTags.description: Complete updated list of tag names the user is watching.

ignoredTags.description: Complete updated list of tag names the user is ignoring.

search.description: Free-text filter applied to tag names and descriptions. Case-insensitive prefix match.

sort.description: `popular` — order by total question count (desc). `name` — alphabetical order. `newest` — order by creation date (desc).

get.description: Returns a paginated list of registered users. Supports optional filtering by username or display name via the `search` query parameter.

400.description: Bad Request — the request payload is invalid or failed validation.

401.description: Unauthorized — a valid authentication token is required.

403.description: Forbidden — you lack the necessary permissions.

404.description: Not Found — the requested resource does not exist.

get.description: Returns the public profile of the user with the given MongoDB ObjectId.

schema.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the target user.

parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the target user.
parameters.name: id

400.description: Bad Request — the request payload is invalid or failed validation.

401.description: Unauthorized — a valid authentication token is required.

403.description: Forbidden — you lack the necessary permissions.

404.description: Not Found — the requested resource does not exist.

put.description: Partially updates the authenticated user's profile. All fields are optional — only the provided fields are updated.

requestBody.description: Fields to update. At least one field must be provided.

200.description: Updated user profile reflecting the new values.

400.description: Bad Request — the request payload is invalid or failed validation.

401.description: Unauthorized — a valid authentication token is required.

403.description: Forbidden — you lack the necessary permissions.

404.description: Not Found — the requested resource does not exist.

get.description: Returns a paginated, chronologically ordered (newest-first) list of activity events for the specified user — questions posted, answers accepted, badges earned, etc.

schema.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the target user.

parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the target user.
parameters.name: id

200.description: Paginated activity feed for the requested user.

400.description: Bad Request — the request payload is invalid or failed validation.

401.description: Unauthorized — a valid authentication token is required.

403.description: Forbidden — you lack the necessary permissions.

404.description: Not Found — the requested resource does not exist.

get.description: Returns aggregated statistics for the authenticated user's personal dashboard: reputation history, question / answer counts, acceptance rate, badge totals, and top tags.

200.description: Aggregated dashboard statistics for the authenticated user.

401.description: Unauthorized — a valid authentication token is required.

403.description: Forbidden — you lack the necessary permissions.

get.description: Returns a paginated, searchable list of all tags. Use the `search` parameter to filter by name or description, and `sort` to control ordering.

schema.description: Free-text filter applied to tag names and descriptions. Case-insensitive prefix match.

parameters.description: Free-text filter applied to tag names and descriptions. Case-insensitive prefix match.
parameters.name: search

schema.description: `popular` — order by total question count (desc). `name` — alphabetical order. `newest` — order by creation date (desc).

parameters.description: `popular` — order by total question count (desc). `name` — alphabetical order. `newest` — order by creation date (desc).
parameters.name: sort

400.description: Bad Request — the request payload is invalid or failed validation.

401.description: Unauthorized — a valid authentication token is required.

403.description: Forbidden — you lack the necessary permissions.

404.description: Not Found — the requested resource does not exist.

post.description:
Creates a new tag in the system. 

> **Established User required** — the authenticated user must have a reputation of **200 or above** to create tags. Requests from users below this threshold will receive a `403 Forbidden` response.

Tag names must be unique, URL-safe (lowercase letters, digits and hyphens) and between 1 and 35 characters long.

requestBody.description: Tag name, description and optional wiki body.

201.description: Tag created successfully. Returns the full detail object of the new tag.

400.description: Bad Request — the request payload is invalid or failed validation.

401.description: Unauthorized — a valid authentication token is required.

403.description: Forbidden — either the token is invalid, or the user's reputation is below the 200-point threshold required to create tags.

409.description: Conflict — a tag with this name already exists.

get.description: Returns the full detail view for a tag, including its wiki body (Markdown), usage statistics, related tags and assigned moderators.

schema.description: MongoDB ObjectId or URL-safe name of the tag.

parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId or URL-safe name of the tag.
parameters.name: id

400.description: Bad Request — the request payload is invalid or failed validation.

401.description: Unauthorized — a valid authentication token is required.

403.description: Forbidden — you lack the necessary permissions.

404.description: Not Found — the requested resource does not exist.

post.description: Adds one or more tags to the authenticated user's **watch list**. Watched tags are used to personalise the question feed and send notifications. Tags already being watched are silently ignored (idempotent). Sending a tag that is currently on the **ignore list** will move it to watched.

requestBody.description: Array of tag names to add to the watch list (1–20 per request).

200.description: Watch list updated. Returns the complete, updated tag preference lists.

400.description: Bad Request — the request payload is invalid or failed validation.

401.description: Unauthorized — a valid authentication token is required.

404.description: Not Found — one or more of the supplied tag names do not exist.

post.description: Adds one or more tags to the authenticated user's **ignore list**. Questions carrying only ignored tags are hidden from the user's feed. Tags already being ignored are silently skipped (idempotent). Sending a tag that is currently on the **watch list** will move it to ignored.

requestBody.description: Array of tag names to add to the ignore list (1–20 per request).

200.description: Ignore list updated. Returns the complete, updated tag preference lists.

400.description: Bad Request — the request payload is invalid or failed validation.

401.description: Unauthorized — a valid authentication token is required.

404.description: Not Found — one or more of the supplied tag names do not exist.
